subject: fix(vercel): disable framework auto-detection to fix output directory error
body:
Vercel's SvelteKit framework auto-detection was overriding the
outputDirectory from vercel.json, causing "No Output Directory named
'build' found" after the build completed. Added "framework": null to
vercel.json to disable auto-detection and let the manual config work.

Also simplified adapter-static config to only specify fallback: '200.html'
(all other options were defaults), eliminating the "Please remove
adapter-static options to enable zero-config mode" warning.

Tags: vercel, build, adapter-static, deployment
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 4
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: vercel-migration
Semver: patch

title: disable framework auto-detection to fix output directory error
